category_sources: Official Cipherdyne fwknop page describes fwknop as Single Packet Authorization for default-drop firewalls.
source_facts.description says Single Packet Authorization and Port Knocking.
display_name_sources: Official Cipherdyne page title identifies fwknop.
docs_sources: Official Cipherdyne fwknop page links Documentation and Tutorial.
Official fwknop manpage is hosted under cipherdyne.org/fwknop/docs.
repo_sources: Official Cipherdyne fwknop page gives the GitHub clone URL for mrash/fwknop.
Official fwknop manpage says GitHub is used for the source code repository.
tags_sources: Official Cipherdyne documentation describes firewall access control use.
source_facts.description identifies Single Packet Authorization and Port Knocking.
